name: Improve profile settings UI and Cloudinary avatar upload
description: Revamp profile settings layout and integrate Cloudinary upload flow.
evidence: Completed on 2026-04-25 and recorded in progress with commit evidence for the profile settings UI refresh and Cloudinary avatar migration. `profile-settings-page.tsx` was redesigned into a more polished layout, i18n locale copy was updated, and avatar upload now uses the signed Cloudinary flow established by `feat-036`. Verification captured in progress includes lint cleanup plus `pnpm --filter @app/web lint`, `pnpm --filter @app/web typecheck`, and `./init.sh` passing.
